title: RAT v3 plugin manifest — kind: marketplace (rat/1)
description: Per-kind manifest schema for `kind: marketplace` (ADR-011). Composes the kind-agnostic envelope (plugin.v1.json) via `allOf` and adds the per-kind constraints: `kind` is fixed to "marketplace", and `provides` MUST contain this kind's minimal mandatory core (`rat://marketplace/v1/search`, `rat://marketplace/v1/get`). The `marketplace` axis defines no further capabilities.
$comment: Layered per ADR-011. Strictness = minimal mandatory core (NOT all capabilities): negotiation means a plugin implements a subset. The orchestrating core that ENFORCES `provides` at runtime (C5) is not built yet (Phase 1) — see plugin.v1.json $comment.
